title: More pixelmon lucky blocks
description: A lucky block addon that adds 5 more pixelmon lucky blocks(there is no category for it so I upload it there)
body:
This mod adds 5 pokemon lucky blocks for pixelmon.

Super ball:Deleted the worst pokemons of normal lucky block(zubat,weedle,metapod...)<---(These are the deleted ones)

- Ultra ball:Only good pokemons(Gengar,tyranitar,infernape)<--(These are examples of the good pokemon ultra ball lets you have more easily)

- Master ball:Only legendary and mythical

- Beast ball:Only ultra beasts

- Luxury ball:Only shinies

To install it,you need pixelmon lucky block and lucky block mod on the version you want to play this mod first(to give credit to the people who did them)

Now,replace the content of the pixelmon files with the ones of the mod you want.

Then,add the pixelmon zip to .minecraft/addons/lucky (if it dont appears,create it)

Also to add textures add the zip to resources packs and put it.

And you have it!These dont have special textures except superball and it is very bad.If you have textures,gmail me to enderraltormail@gmail.com.You will be credited

These blocks dont have a way to be crafted or founded on survival so do what you would think itts necesary to get them

Credits: ModifiedME for doing the original pixlemon lucky block(the pokeball ones) Hardy for doing the first(but not adding the download) and giving me the idea PlayerInDistress for doing lucky block mod Pixelmon team for doing pixelmon Nintendo and game freak for doing pokemon
